NAPA 100 Year Premium T-Shirt

$10.00 – $14.00 / Shirt
50 Shirts per Case

Celebrate 100 years of NAPA!

  • This is a limited run — when they’re gone, they’re gone
  • Sold in bundles (perfect for giveaways or staff)
  • Three great designs — must order minimum of 50
  • Special offer while supplies last: Buy 3 cases and get a free case of NAPA cupholders!

Features

  • 5.5 ounce, 50/50 cotton/poly
  • Made with up to 5% recycled polyester from plastic bottles
  • Rib knit collar
  • Back neck tape
  • Shrink and wrinkle resistant

*** Order by 11:59 PM EDT on Sunday, June 8 and have your shirts delivered by 7/15/25 ***

Pricing for S/M/L/XL
1-3 Cases $10.00 / Shirt $500 / Case
4-5 Cases $9.50 / Shirt $475 / Case
6+ Cases $9.00 / Shirt $450 / Case
  • 1 case contains 50 shirts
  • You may mix and match styles and sizes in any quantities
  • Cart total must be in multiples of 50 shirts (e.g., 50, 100, 150)
  • Add $2.50 per shirt for sizes 2XL and 3XL
  • Add $4.00 per shirt for sizes 4XL and 5XL
  • Price includes shipping to store

Questions? Contact us by email at info@arthurelliott.com or call us at (704) 856-3120.

Clear

Shirt(s)

Please note, you must order a minimum of 50 shirts and your cart must contain a total number of shirts in multiples of 50.
